title: Multi-thread contact depth jumped to 4.6 contacts per account this quarter
anchor: 38 of 47 accounts now carry 4-plus engaged contacts, up from 18 of 47 last quarter.
connect: Accounts at 4-plus contacts renew at 91% versus 67% at 1-2 contacts.
body: 38 of 47 accounts now carry 4-plus engaged contacts, up from 18 of 47 last quarter. Accounts at 4-plus contacts renew at 91% versus 67% at 1-2 contacts.
trace: Multi-threading signal shows dramatic improvement from 2.3 to 4.6 average contacts, with clear renewal correlation data.

title: Champion re-engagement recovered 7 of 9 accounts to green health scores
anchor: 9 accounts where champions had gone 14-plus days without interaction received confirmed responses in April, up from 3 in March.
connect: 7 of those 9 crossed back to green health within 21 days of re-engagement.
body: 9 accounts where champions had gone 14-plus days without interaction received confirmed responses in April, up from 3 in March. 7 of those 9 crossed back to green health within 21 days of re-engagement.
trace: Champion gap recovery shows both volume increase (3 to 9) and high success rate (7 of 9 recovered).

title: Strategic stakeholder maps hit 84% freshness in the last 30 days
anchor: 21 of 25 strategic accounts updated stakeholder maps within 30 days, up from 14 of 25 in February.
connect: Strategic accounts with fresh maps renew 22 points higher than those without.
body: 21 of 25 strategic accounts updated stakeholder maps within 30 days, up from 14 of 25 in February. Strategic accounts with fresh maps renew 22 points higher than those without.
trace: Stakeholder map freshness improved from 56% to 84% with strong renewal correlation data.

title: Outreach coverage reaches 94% with 44 of 47 accounts touched in 14 days
anchor: This marks the highest two-week outreach coverage recorded since Q4 2025.
connect: Only 3 accounts in the active book lack a CSM interaction in the past 14 days.
body: This marks the highest two-week outreach coverage recorded since Q4 2025. Only 3 accounts in the active book lack a CSM interaction in the past 14 days.
trace: Outreach coverage signal shows both current performance (94%) and historical context (best since Q4 2025).

title: Q3 renewal pipeline carries $1.8M across 18 accounts

body: 14 of 18 renewal accounts show executive sponsor contact logged in the last 30 days. Renewals with executive engagement close at 89% versus 61% without.
trace: Q3 renewal pipeline shows strong executive coverage (78%) with clear correlation to close rates.

title: Early renewals pulled forward $420K across 6 accounts in Q2

connect: These accounts originally tracked to Q3 or Q4 close dates.
body: 5 of 6 early-commit accounts had been flagged green for two consecutive months before the conversation. These accounts originally tracked to Q3 or Q4 close dates.
trace: Early renewal pull-forward shows health score predictive value and timing acceleration.
